description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a smooth, black surface and slightly upturned nose and tail. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the thin edge, and is topped with a solid black grip tape for traction. The skateboard is supported by two sets of trucks, each mounted with a pair of medium-sized, reddish-purple wheels. The wheels are classic in shape, suitable for street or park use, and the trucks are standard, metallic, and low-profile. There are no visible brand logos or graphic designs on the deck, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall build suggests durability and functionality for urban skateboarding environments.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black deck, solid black grip tape, and reddish-purple classic wheels, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, the layered wood edge, and both sets of reddish-purple wheels.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck and the solid black grip tape surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the deck's length and both sets of wheels.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, again showing the width and black grip tape.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, medium-sized, reddish-purple, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, low-profile, metallic silver, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
